metadata.description: 91social's Claude Code plugin marketplace, offering plugins that connect Claude to 91social products such as the Hyrewyse / HirePlus recruitment platform.

plugins.name: hireplus
plugins.description: Connect Claude to the Hyrewyse / HirePlus recruitment platform via its MCP server: create job descriptions, add and score candidate resumes, generate and list screening/interview questions, and run a silent interview co-pilot. Bundles the hyrewyse-recruiting, generate-screening-questions, generate-interview-questions, and interview-oncall skills plus list commands.
